claims.headline: Pyrrolidone cognitive enhancer
claims.notesSentence: Pramiracetam (CI-879) facilitated acquisition of a radial-arm maze task in rats, in line with the pyrrolidone class of cognitive enhancers.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Pramiracetam radial-arm maze study on PubMed

claims.headline: Influences hippocampal cholinergic activity
claims.notesSentence: Preclinical work reported pramiracetam altered high-affinity choline uptake in rat hippocampal synaptosomes, suggesting a cholinergic mechanism.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Pramiracetam hippocampal choline uptake study on PubMed
